prompt: Order these gaming milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Pac-Man released
events.fact: 1980 — pop culture arcade sensation by Namco

events.title: NES released in US
events.fact: 1985 — revived the home video game industry

events.title: PlayStation 1 launched
events.fact: 1994 — Sony enters market with 3D CD graphics

events.title: Minecraft full release
events.fact: 2011 — sandbox game becomes best-selling of all time
